description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with the docker:dind service, defines variables BRANCH_IMAGE, MASTER_IMAGE, VERSION_IMAGE, and others, and has stages build, test, release, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs `docker pull $BRANCH_IMAGE || true`, then `make build image=$BRANCH_IMAGE`, then `docker push $BRANCH_IMAGE`. In the test stage add a code-quality job (allow_failure) that runs `make code-quality image=$BRANCH_IMAGE report_file=cq_branch.txt || true`, `make code-quality image=$MASTER_IMAGE report_file=cq_master.txt || true`, and `./backend/scripts/compare-cq-reports.sh cq_branch.txt cq_master.txt`; also add a test job that installs `apk add --no-cache py-pip curl bc`, installs docker‑compose via `pip install docker-compose`, runs `make test image=$BRANCH_IMAGE`, runs `./backend/scripts/check-coverage.sh`, and publishes the `backend/htmlcov` directory as an artifact while capturing coverage with the regex `/TOTAL.+ ([0-9]+\.[0-9]+\%)$/`. In the deploy stage add a manual deploy-production job that runs `./backend/scripts/deploy.sh $PRODUCTION_SERVER_IP $VERSION_IMAGE $PRODUCTION_SETTINGS`, is limited to commits with a tag, and targets the production environment at http://chat.rubick.cz. Also add a deploy-staging job that runs `./backend/scripts/deploy.sh $STAGING_SERVER_IP $BRANCH_IMAGE $STAGING_SETTINGS`, runs only on the master branch, and targets the staging environment at http://staging.chat.rubick.cz. All jobs inherit a before_script that installs make via `apk add --no-cache make` and logs into the GitLab registry with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`.
